div.div:
Discover Config + Init State
discover.py finds eval.yaml
1 → auto; many → ask user
read skill field → eval-name
state.py init optimize-config
model, max_iterations, run_id

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-run (iter-0)
external skill (Skill tool)
run full suite if no results
same --model each iteration
state.py read summary.yaml
all judges pass → exit early

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 253px; height: 1px; padding-top: 23px; margin-left: 927px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Identify Failures
which judges failed, which cases
read failure rationale
systematic vs input-dependent
check review.yaml (human feedback)
tag judge_type per failure

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 23px; margin-left: 1272px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Analyze Root Causes
LLM agents (Explore)
read SKILL.md (find_skills.py)
trace failing cases stdout.log
examine failing case outputs
form grounded hypotheses

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Edit the SKILL.md
LLM-driven targeted edits
ground each edit in evidence
surgical, minimal changes
explain the why, avoid overfit
show diff before applying

/eval-run (iter-N)
external skill (Skill tool)
--cases (targeted) or full
--baseline iter-(N-1)
--no-llm-judges (structural)
state.py read summary.yaml

div.div:
Handle Regression
assess severity vs original
minor → keep, net positive
major → revert, reframe edit
stuck → report, suggest review

Report Outcome
edits → failures fixed
iterations taken, final scores
persistent failures explained
next: /eval-review, /eval-mlflow

div.div:
judge (type) → cases → rationale
cost_budget (builtin)
→ [c03] over max_cost_usd
ac_present (check)
→ [c01,c07] no accept. criteria
faithful (llm)
→ [c07] output drifts from spec
human_review
→ [c07] user flagged tone

div.div:
hypothesis: Step 4 says
"optionally add accept. criteria"
evidence: transcript skipped Step 4
- optionally add acceptance criteria
+ add acceptance criteria for each
+ story so reviewers verify scope
